buildCommand: rustup default stable && rustup target add wasm32-unknown-unknown && export PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" && curl https://rustwasm.github.io/wasm-pack/installer/init.sh -sSf | sh && npm run build:wasm && npx shadow-cljs release app

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' 'wasm-unsafe-eval' https:; connect-src 'self' https: wss:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https:; media-src 'self' blob:; worker-src 'self' blob:; font-src 'self' data:; frame-src https://vercel.live https://vercel.com;
